model: 8-factor callback_v3 (A requirements, B competition, C screening, D spike, E warmpath, F conversion, G recency, H momentum)

ranked.title: AI Delivery Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Very fresh ~4-day posting at a small ~40-person founder-led Series A team with ambiguity-friendly, no-engineer-required requirements matching Ryan's FA/cross-functional profile — human hiring-manager read in a low-competition window.
ranked.biggest_risk: Core is customer delivery/implementation + compliance/governance in regulated financial services — adjacent to but not the same as community-led growth; he meets the bar without standing out.
ranked.apply_move: Apply within 48h while the posting is fresh; lead the application with a concrete delivery-from-zero narrative (Minima first-employee scaling) framed as 'turning ambiguous customer requirements into shipped outcomes', plus a Claude Code agent artifact.
ranked.caveat: Fintech-delivery/compliance is adjacent not core; you meet the bar but don't spike on it.

ranked.title: Founding Brand & Growth (Growth Generalist)
ranked.biggest_lever: Role explicitly de-prioritises seniority/B2B and prizes a creative operator who built brands/communities/companies from zero — a founding marketing hire read by founders, not an ATS. Highest A/C/D/E in the batch.
ranked.biggest_risk: Single 'most consequential first marketing hire' so the bar on creative taste/portfolio is very high; 6 weeks open means a strong shortlist may exist.
ranked.apply_move: Submit a sharp creative portfolio (built things, not just growth metrics) — show brand/creative output from Minima + community builds; lead with taste, not funnel numbers.
ranked.caveat: 43 days open (mid recency) — shortlist may be forming; needs demonstrable creative taste, not just growth metrics.

ranked.title: Founder's Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Direct founder-inbox application connecting Ryan's literal FA-at-scaling-startup experience + 100k community + crypto/startup-signal fluency to Specter's VC/deal-sourcing mission — bypasses ATS, lands on a human. Highest warm-path (E=90) in the batch.
ranked.biggest_risk: 1-2yr target suggests a cheaper/junior hire at the GBP42k floor; Ryan at 6.4yr could read as over-leveled or expensive.
ranked.apply_move: Email careers@tryspecter.com directly with a tight founder-to-founder note explicitly mapping his FA track record + crypto/startup-signal fluency to Specter's deal-sourcing community thesis.
ranked.caveat: Salary floor GBP42k < 50k target; could read over-leveled for a 1-2yr seat. Undatable posting.

ranked.title: Product Marketer - London
ranked.biggest_lever: Reframe Minima as an AI-native content/growth engine built from zero ($4.5m presale, content engine) + concrete Claude/Cursor automation artifacts — the listing literally describes Ryan's self-taught spike (D=85) as the ideal profile.
ranked.biggest_risk: Domain mismatch — target audience is Finance/CFO B2B SaaS buyers, not crypto/community; competition from polished B2B SaaS marketers who already 'speak CFO'.
ranked.apply_move: Open with an AI-native content engine artifact (Claude/Cursor-built) and explicitly bridge to the CFO/finance audience — show you can learn-the-buyer fast, not that you already know finance.
ranked.caveat: CFO/finance-SaaS audience is a real (learnable) domain gap; 41 days open.

ranked.title: Founding Growth Lead
ranked.biggest_lever: Lead with the $4.5m community-led presale (15x ROI on $300k) reframed as zero-to-one pipeline building + the Claude Code AI workflow the application form demands — both map directly to 'build growth from scratch' and 'fluent in AI'. Founder-read screen (C=88).
ranked.biggest_risk: Role is explicitly B2B outbound sales-pipeline ownership (cold outreach, deal closure for clients like Red Bull) — no enterprise B2B sales/closing track record; high media hype raises volume.
ranked.apply_move: Complete the application form's Claude Code workflow ask with a genuinely impressive agent artifact, and frame community-led growth as proven pipeline-from-zero — pre-empt the 'can he close B2B?' doubt with the 15x presale ROI.
ranked.caveat: In-person Shoreditch; role is B2B outbound sales-pipeline ownership — adjacent to community growth, not identical. ~7 days fresh but undated.

ranked.title: Founding Growth Marketer
ranked.biggest_lever: Sequoia-backed 11-person team — CEO personally reads applications (C=90, E=85); a tailored 'first growth hire who built a repeatable GTM playbook from zero ($4.5m presale)' pitch + AI artifact lands directly with the decision-maker, sidestepping the enterprise-B2B gap.
ranked.biggest_risk: Enterprise B2B early-stage growth preference vs community-led consumer-crypto growth; supply-chain/procurement domain unfamiliar; open ~3 months (recency G=10) signals selectivity.
ranked.apply_move: Direct, tailored CEO-facing pitch leading with the repeatable-GTM-playbook-from-zero story plus an AI-automation artifact.
ranked.caveat: STALE recency (93 days, G=10) — open ~3 months signals high selectivity; enterprise/supply-chain domain gap.

ranked.title: Operations Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Ryan cleanly clears every stated requirement and all three 'preferred' bullets (early-stage startup, high agency, AI-tools-to-multiply-output); role explicitly welcomes any experience level.
ranked.biggest_risk: 6-7 days/week in-office + 48hr in-person work trial; generalist ops where Ryan is adequate not spiked; competes against consulting/banking/military profiles the listing courts; low conversion (F=45).
ranked.apply_move: Apply but pre-qualify the 6-7 day in-office reality; lead with high-agency + AI-multiplier evidence to differentiate from the consulting/banking pool.
ranked.caveat: IN-OFFICE-HEAVY (6-7 days/wk) + 48hr in-person trial; low conversion realism (F=45); not a spike role.

ranked.title: GTM Associate, London
ranked.biggest_lever: Frame the $4.5m presale + 50k->5k lifecycle conversion as proven GTM conversion/retention outcomes; lead the AI-power-user requirement with concrete Claude Code workflows — both explicit must-haves Ryan can over-index on.
ranked.biggest_risk: Wealthtech/financial-advice domain outside crypto/AI-tooling; leans demo/sales-conversion (adjacent not identical to community growth). Salary floor GBP40k.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with quantified GTM conversion outcomes (50k->5k, 15x ROI) + a Claude Code workflow artifact; address the wealthtech domain gap proactively.
ranked.caveat: Salary floor GBP40k < 50k target; in-person + international travel; 78 days open (stale-ish).

ranked.title: AI Operations Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: Lead with a built Claude Code / n8n agent artifact, not a CV — role explicitly prizes hands-on agentic-AI builders, Ryan's rarest credible signal among generalist applicants.
ranked.biggest_risk: Half ops-automation builder, half Salesforce-admin/commercial-ops owner (invoicing, supplier onboarding, SLAs) — the process-rigor/enterprise-ops half is an anti-fit; 5 weeks open means a shortlist may exist.
ranked.apply_move: Open with a working n8n/Claude agent artifact; acknowledge the Salesforce/commercial-ops half candidly and lean on AI-builder differentiation.
ranked.caveat: Half the role is Salesforce-admin/commercial-ops (anti-fit); confirmed live on Workable 2026-06-09.

ranked.title: AI Operations Specialist
ranked.biggest_lever: Central ask — a hands-on builder deploying Claude/n8n/Zapier agentic workflows into real business ops — overlaps directly with Ryan's current Claude Code agent work, a credible AI-builder story.
ranked.biggest_risk: Explicit '2-5 years product/business operations/strategy/TPM' requirement + large-fintech recruiter/ATS gate (C=40); marketing/community/FA titles don't keyword-match the ops/TPM gate.
ranked.apply_move: Mirror ops/TPM keywords in the CV and lead with a concrete agentic-workflow build to clear the recruiter screen.
ranked.caveat: Large-fintech ATS/recruiter gate (C=40); title-keyword mismatch is the main screen-out risk.

ranked.title: Deployment Strategist
ranked.biggest_lever: Early-career + business/product framing + no hard SWE gate + small founder-led team — founding-generalist + Claude-Code literacy + stakeholder skills can land a human read at a reachable seniority.
ranked.biggest_risk: TIC/industrial-inspection domain far from crypto/AI-consumer; wants enterprise post-sales/account-growth experience Ryan lacks.
ranked.apply_move: Lead with founder-led-team-fit and Claude-Code deployment literacy; downplay domain, emphasise stakeholder-facing adaptability.
ranked.caveat: STALE recency (146 days, G=10); TIC/industrial domain cold; wants enterprise post-sales experience.

ranked.title: Founders Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: Claude-Code automation + founding-generalist 'turn ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams' maps onto the AI-workflows + strategic-projects part of the JD.
ranked.biggest_risk: Front-loads executive-assistant/diary work at a non-AI creative studio; over-experienced for the EA portion, off-domain; possible sub-GBP50k and hard NW7 commute.
ranked.apply_move: If pursued, frame for the strategic-projects/AI-workflows slice and confirm the EA-work split before investing.
ranked.caveat: EA/diary-heavy + non-AI studio; possible sub-GBP50k; hard in-office NW7 commute; not a spike.

ranked.title: AI Product Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: The application asks every candidate to build an n8n workflow + screenshot — Ryan's Claude Code/agent fluency can produce a genuinely impressive artifact, the one place a non-PM stands out.
ranked.biggest_risk: No PM title; AI work is internal tooling not shipped products; 260-person $5.2bn co with heavy ATS volume; Berlin-anchored vs UK-only work authorisation.
ranked.apply_move: Submit a standout n8n workflow artifact; only pursue if remote-UK is genuinely viable.
ranked.caveat: Berlin-anchored — UK work-authorisation viability uncertain; no PM title vs PM req; fresh (7 days) but low screen-pass odds (C=25).

ranked.title: Customer Success Manager
ranked.location: London (Camden; onsite at customer depots 3d/wk + field)
ranked.biggest_lever: Founder-read 5-person screening (C=85): a strong intro call + take-home showing operator agency + AI fluency can offset the missing CS title.
ranked.biggest_risk: No CS/account-management background, no logistics/industrial domain, demanding depot-field/early-start requirement — three stacked mismatches.
ranked.apply_move: Only if the depot-field/early-start commitment is acceptable; lead with operator agency in the intro call.
ranked.caveat: Depot-field 3d/wk + early starts (in-office-heavy); no CS background (D=38); confirmed open 2026-06-09.

ranked.title: Growth Generalist
ranked.biggest_lever: Generalist growth/brand/content profile genuinely fits the spec, and the role waives B2B-experience requirements — on craft he could compete (A=78, D=70).
ranked.biggest_risk: $11B lab + remote-global + no experience bar = enormous applicant pool through recruiter/ATS (C=35, B=20); non-traditional CV likely screened out before the story lands.
ranked.apply_move: If pursued, lead with craft artifacts (content/growth-engine builds) to survive the keyword screen; treat as a low-odds high-upside flyer.
ranked.caveat: STALE recency (138 days, G=10); brutal ATS volume at a hype lab (C=35); low screen-pass odds despite good fit.

ranked.title: Chief of Staff
ranked.biggest_lever: Direct-to-founder 300-word email application with a 48-hour response promise — bypasses all ATS/recruiter screening (C=95, E=95), the single highest-leverage application channel in the batch.
ranked.biggest_risk: Same-day financial-modelling + investor-pitch + strategy at 'founder-level intensity' may exceed Ryan's evidenced finance-modelling depth; AI-governance domain doesn't pull his crypto/community spikes.
ranked.apply_move: Send the 300-word direct-founder email (48h response window) — low effort, high-leverage channel even if odds are moderate.
ranked.caveat: Finance-modelling/investor-pitch bar may exceed evidenced depth; AI-governance domain off-spike; 70 days open (neutral momentum H=48).

ranked.title: Founder's Associate, Growth & Operations
ranked.biggest_lever: Frame Ryan's funnel work (50k email list -> 5k presale conversions, 15x ROI) as transferable sales-enablement + activation analytics — his hard quantified funnel results.
ranked.biggest_risk: Stale evergreen posting (~10 months) at a non-AI VA-staffing firm with a low GBP33-55k band and sales-ops/churn focus that hits no spike; unclear the seat is actively being filled.
ranked.apply_move: Deprioritize — amber momentum + evergreen posting suggest low genuine fill intent.
ranked.caveat: AMBER momentum (H=33); 287-day evergreen posting; non-AI VA-staffing; low band (GBP33-55k).

ranked.title: Strategy & Operations
ranked.biggest_lever: Founder-mindset + extreme-ownership + first-employee-scaling narrative answers the cultural bar; no hard technical blocker.
ranked.biggest_risk: Rewards operational/data/process rigor in enterprise logistics, not community-GTM/crypto spike; 50-75% travel + high applicant volume at a hot YC co.
ranked.apply_move: Only if 50-75% travel is acceptable; lead with extreme-ownership narrative.
ranked.caveat: STALE recency (89 days, G=5); 50-75% travel; enterprise-logistics process focus off-spike.

ranked.title: Agent Strategy Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: Reframe Minima first-employee scaling + C-level stakeholder comms + Claude-Code building as 'strategic advisor who can talk product, deployment and outcomes'.
ranked.biggest_risk: Hot well-funded co at GBP105-140K attracts hundreds of experienced enterprise CS/deployment applicants; no documented enterprise B2B delivery — likely ATS/recruiter screen-out.
ranked.apply_move: Low priority; if pursued, lead hard on strategic-advisor framing to survive the screen.
ranked.caveat: STALE recency (77 days, G=5); enterprise-CS gate (C=35, B=22) at a hot high-paying co.

ranked.title: Deployment Strategist - Europe
ranked.biggest_lever: Position Claude-Code agent-building as hands-on prototyping with LLM/agent frameworks + customer/executive-facing strength to argue 'credible with engineering teams'.
ranked.biggest_risk: Hard technical gate (Python + API + FDE-adjacent) Ryan doesn't formally meet + massive volume at a hype co — high chance of automatic technical screen-out.
ranked.apply_move: Deprioritize — hard technical gate (A=35, C=30) is a near-blocker.
ranked.caveat: Hard Python/API/FDE technical gate Ryan doesn't meet; high screen-out risk despite green momentum.

ranked.title: Product Manager
ranked.biggest_lever: AI-native/Claude-Code builder identity is what the JD prizes; consumer-growth lens fits the 'consumer-minded builder' path.
ranked.biggest_risk: No PM/solutions-eng/TAM/CS-eng title, no evidence of scoping webhooks/OAuth/integrations — likely technical-fluency screen-out for a PM req.
ranked.apply_move: Deprioritize — amber momentum + 265-day stale posting + PM technical gate.
ranked.caveat: AMBER momentum (H=42); 265-day stale posting; PM technical gate (A=35).

ranked.title: AI, Operations & Strategy Associate
ranked.biggest_lever: London-hybrid ops-team role with an AI-experimentation/vendor-evaluation slice lightly touching Ryan's Claude-Code work.
ranked.biggest_risk: Title misleading — actual work is AI-infra/MLOps engineering (model hosting, orchestration, pipelines, eval frameworks) Ryan can't evidence; healthtech domain compounds the gap.
ranked.apply_move: Skip — requirements are ML-infra engineering (A=25), a hard blocker.
ranked.caveat: Hard ML-engineering requirements blocker (A=25); stale (141 days); healthtech domain.

ranked.title: Deployment Strategist
ranked.biggest_lever: AI-leverage thesis + ambiguity-comfort + enablement/ambassador-style programmes gives a thin bridge to 'help customers rethink work with AI'.
ranked.biggest_risk: Core requirement is enterprise B2B deployment/renewals/expansion — explicitly NOT Ryan's experience — at a hyper-famous brand with massive volume + recruiter keyword screening.
ranked.apply_move: Skip — enterprise B2B deployment requirement is an explicit anti-fit (B=12, A=35).
ranked.caveat: Enterprise B2B deployment/renewals anti-fit; stale (117 days); brutal volume at a hype brand.

top5.title: AI Delivery Associate
top5.reason: Top compound: green momentum (88) + freshest posting in batch (4 days, G=88) + small founder-led team (C=78) + strong A=80. Best genuine-callback bet — fresh, low-competition human read.
top5.apply_move: Apply within 48h; lead with delivery-from-zero narrative + Claude Code artifact.

top5.title: Founding Brand & Growth
top5.reason: Highest requirements/screening/spike compound (A=90, C=92, D=92) + founder-read + green momentum (82). The role's profile is Ryan's profile.
top5.apply_move: Submit a creative-taste portfolio of built things, not growth metrics.

top5.title: Founder's Associate
top5.reason: Highest warm-path in batch (E=90) + direct founder-inbox + spike D=80 + literal FA mirror. Bypasses ATS entirely. Diversity: a true FA seat to balance the growth-marketing picks.
top5.apply_move: Email careers@tryspecter.com with a founder-to-founder note mapping FA + crypto-signal fluency to their thesis.

top5.title: Product Marketer
top5.reason: Listing literally describes Ryan's self-taught AI-content spike (D=85, A=82) + green momentum + good warm path. Diversity: product-marketing lane distinct from founding-generalist roles.
top5.apply_move: Open with an AI-native content-engine artifact bridged to the CFO/finance audience.

top5.title: Founding Growth Lead
top5.reason: Chosen over Magentic (64) despite lower raw number: ivee has live recency (~7 days, G=52) + green momentum vs Magentic's 93-day stale recency (G=10) propping a similar score. Founder-read (C=88) + form demands a Claude artifact Ryan can ace.
top5.apply_move: Complete the form's Claude Code workflow ask with a strong agent artifact; pre-empt the B2B-closing doubt with the 15x presale ROI.

watch_amber.title: Founder's Associate, Growth & Operations
watch_amber.why: 287-day evergreen posting at a non-AI VA-staffing firm — amber momentum signals low genuine fill intent despite decent A=72.

watch_amber.title: Product Manager
watch_amber.why: 265-day stale posting + PM technical gate (no PM title, no integration scoping evidence) — amber momentum, low real callback chance.

excluded_closed.title: Founders Associate
excluded_closed.note: Closed — removed from Ashby board and absent from official careers page.

excluded_closed.title: Founder's Associate (Ops)
excluded_closed.note: Closed — role not applyable (no live ATS).

excluded_closed.title: GTM, Strategy & Delivery
excluded_closed.note: New York in-person only — work-authorisation/location blocked for UK-only Ryan (F_conversion=15).
